title: tina psychedelic practical street
prompt: Treat Image 1 as the edit target for Tina identity, wardrobe, pose, product, car interior, and camera. Image 2 supports her face and pink gummy only. Change the street outside into cheerful seventies Japanese pop-surreal cinema made with practical optical effects: tropical cutout flowers slide across live-action lawns, painted fruit moons hang from visible wires, saturated color fields bloom through asphalt, and tiny duplicate Tinas wave from distant passing windows. Keep Tina and the car photoreal and stable. Handmade compositing, playful awkwardness, youthful and sophisticated, no horror, no modern CGI glow, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
